headlines.h: Science Desk Investigates: I don’t sit… I pose.
headlines.b: The peer review process consisted of one stare, two slow blinks, and a decisive nap.
Officials confirm this is being treated as a "meow-jor" development. (Filed: 2026-05-06)

headlines.h: Exclusive: Government Announces New Standard: “This human just showed up one day and never left..."
headlines.b: Applies to boxes, laundry baskets, and your freshly folded clothes (especially those).
Residents advised to secure fragile objects and prepare for hallway drag races.
